jobs.title: Shore Excursions Product Development Manager
jobs.description:
Your Purpose

In line with current and future tourism trends, the Shore Excursions Product Development Manager oversees product content and delivery, negotiates costs, and develops new tours to grow revenue and enhance guest satisfaction in specific geographical regions.

Your Impact

- Lead the development of innovative shore excursion products and manage the tour program for assigned regions.

- Source and procure high-quality excursions in line with seasonal demand and company standards.

- Monitor market trends, guest preferences, and potential risks to develop effective action and improvement plans.

- Analyze guest feedback and satisfaction scores to drive continuous product and service enhancements.

- Build and maintain relationships with up to 100 tour operators, overseeing a portfolio of 1,000+ tours.

- Negotiate contracts with suppliers, manage large-scale bids, and optimize costs to ensure profitability and efficiency.

- Collaborate cross-functionally with Legal, Insurance, and Operations teams to ensure compliance and risk mitigation.

- Oversee product creation, feedback analysis, and product revamping to maintain competitive and engaging offerings.

- Ensure inventory accuracy and perform regular site inspections within assigned destinations.

- Represent the company at government meetings, industry events, and travel conventions to strengthen partnerships and brand presence.

Your Journey so far

- 10 years of experience in the Shore Excursions Department within the cruise industry (either onboard or ashore) is preferred. Experience in shore excursion operations within the hospitality industry or with a global tour operator may also be considered.

- 5–10+ years of proven experience in global shore excursion operations is required, including product development, bid management, and cross-functional collaboration with legal, insurance, and operations stakeholders.

- A bachelor’s degree in tourism and proficiency in multiple languages are highly preferred.

Your Essentials

- Flexibility and strong analytical skills.

- Excellent communication and collaboration abilities.

- IT-savvy; experience with Fidelio is highly advantageous.

- Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Office applications (Excel, Word, PowerPoint, Publisher).

- Extensive knowledge of shore excursion products and operational delivery.

- Fluent in English with a good command of Italian; additional languages are an asset.

- Willingness to travel up to 25% of the time.

- Must hold an EU passport or have the legal right to work in Switzerland.

Our commitment

We are committed to building a future that values diverse perspectives, embraces the world beyond borders, and fosters an inclusive environment where every individual feels valued, respected and empowered to be their authentic selves. Our commitment extends to taking meaningful, measurable actions that have a long-term positive impact on our guests, our employees and our planet.

Ready to turn your passion into something extraordinary? Join us at MSC Cruises, where new opportunities await. Apply today to be part of a global team that is pushing boundaries and achieving something remarkable. Your journey starts here!

jobs.title: F&B Service Manager
jobs.description:
Your Purpose

The F&B Service Manager is a strategic headquarters-based role responsible for providing leadership, oversight, and guidance for all Food & Beverage service operations across the fleet. This role ensures service excellence, consistency in guest experience, and alignment with corporate standards. Acting as the primary liaison between shipboard teams and corporate leadership, the Manager of F&B Service drives quality, innovation, compliance, and talent development across all F&B operations. This role reports directly to the Vice President of F&B.

Your Impact

Strategic Operations & Standards

- Define, implement, and maintain fleet-wide F&B service standards and best practices.

- Develop and oversee strategic initiatives to enhance guest experience and operational efficiency across all vessels.

- Coordinate with shipboard teams to ensure compliance with corporate policies, procedures, and brand standards.

- Conduct remote audits, operational reviews, and assessments to maintain service excellence.

Guest Experience & Quality Assurance

- Monitor guest satisfaction and F&B performance metrics, analyze trends, and recommend improvements.

- Collaborate with culinary and beverage teams to innovate and elevate the onboard F&B offering.

- Ensure alignment with global health, safety, and hygiene protocols through corporate-led programs.

Training & Leadership Development

- Design and oversee training programs for F&B teams to ensure consistency with the brand’s service philosophy.

- Mentor and develop shipboard F&B leaders to support career progression and succession planning.

Human Resources & Leadership Oversight

- Collaborate with HR on performance reviews, promotions, rotations, and career pathing for F&B personnel.

- Promote a high-performance culture rooted in recognition, development, and fairness.

Fleet Support & Headquarters Coordination

- Serve as the principal corporate liaison for all F&B service matters across the fleet.

- Coordinate F&B equipment planning, material sourcing, and integration of brand standards.

- Compile and analyze operational reports, voyage summaries, and performance metrics for corporate leadership.

- Participate in key shipboard meetings remotely or in person as required.

Financial Oversight

- Support financial sustainability and profitability of F&B operations across the fleet.

- Implement continuous improvement programs to achieve operational and financial targets.

- Oversee cost control, inventory planning, and resource allocation in coordination with shipboard teams.

Your Journey so far

- Minimum 15 years in high-end Food & Beverage operations.

- At least 5 years in senior leadership roles within luxury hospitality or cruise operations.

- Proven experience in multi-site operational oversight.

Your Essentials

Leadership & Communication

- Strategic, dynamic leader with experience managing multicultural teams.

- Excellent communication skills, fluent in English; additional languages an asset.

Technical & Operational Knowledge

- Proficient in Microsoft Office and industry-specific systems.

- Strong understanding of HR protocols, labor regulations, and compliance standards.

- Expert knowledge of F&B operations, beverage programming, and luxury hospitality standards.

Professional Competencies

- Strategic thinker with operational agility and strong business acumen.

- Results-driven, detail-oriented, and highly collaborative.

- Capable of working cross-functionally across corporate and shipboard teams.

Our commitment

We are committed to building a future that values diverse perspectives, embraces the world beyond borders, and fosters an inclusive environment where every individual feels valued, respected and empowered to be their authentic selves. Our commitment extends to taking meaningful, measurable actions that have a long-term positive impact on our guests, our employees and our planet.

Ready to turn your passion into something extraordinary? Join us at MSC Cruises, where new opportunities await. Apply today to be part of a global team that is pushing boundaries and achieving something remarkable. Your journey starts here!

jobs.title: Destinations Experience Manager
jobs.description:
Where passion meets opportunity

Discover your journey into the extraordinary.

Your Purpose

The Destination Experience Manager is fully responsible for the performance, development, and operational excellence of assigned regions.
This role requires strong cruise shore excursion experience, deep knowledge of ports and destination logistics, and a solid understanding of onboard operations. The Manager oversees the full lifecycle of destination experiences — from sourcing and contracting to onboard delivery and financial performance.

Your Impact

Destination & Product Management
•    Develop and manage destination experiences across assigned regions
•    Scout and contract TOs/DMCs through structured bidding and negotiation
•    Ensure experiences are operationally feasible and aligned with luxury brand standards
•    Manage pricing, ROI, and capacity planning
•    Oversee content coordination with Marketing and system loading (Seaware, Otalio, etc.)

Onboard & Operational Support
•    Ensure products reflect onboard realities (timings, guest demographics, mobility considerations)
•    Train and support onboard Destination teams
•    Assist with escalations, refunds, and service recovery when required
•    Monitor guest feedback and implement corrective actions

Financial & Performance Management
•    Own budgeting and revenue performance for assigned regions
•    Monitor margins, refund trends, and voyage-level contribution
•    Identify underperforming ports and optimize offerings accordingly
•    Partner with Finance and Analytics on reporting and dashboards

 

Your Journey so far

- 7–10+ years in cruise shore excursions, destination management, or luxury travel

- Bachelor’s degree in Hospitality, Tourism, Business, or equivalent experience preferred.

Your Essentials

- Strong onboard cruise experience and operational understanding

- Deep knowledge of ports and destination infrastructure

- Knowledge of Alaska, Caribbean, South America, or Asia regions is a strong advantage

- Proven negotiation and financial management skills

- Strong analytical and communication abilities

- Fluent in English; additional languages are an asset

- Valid Swiss work permit or eligibility to work in Switzerland / US permit for Miami position 

At Explora Journeys, we are redefining luxury ocean travel — where discovery, well-being, and a deep respect for the seas come together in harmony. 
We seek passionate professionals who share our vision of a more immersive, transformative way to discover the world’s most inspiring destinations by sea.
Are you ready to turn your passion into something extraordinary? Join us at Explora Journeys, where an ocean of opportunities awaits. Your journey to the Ocean State of Mind starts here.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Dove la passione incontra l'opportunità Scopri il tuo viaggio nello straordinario. Il tuo scopo Il Destination Experience Manager è pienamente responsabile per le prestazioni, lo sviluppo e l'eccellenza operativa delle regioni assegnate. Questo ruolo richiede una forte esperienza di crociera sulle coste, una profonda conoscenza dei porti e della logistica di destinazione, e una solida comprensione delle operazioni a bordo. Il Manager sovrintende al ciclo di vita completo delle esperienze di destinazione, dal sourcing e dal contrarsi alla consegna a bordo e alle prestazioni finanziarie. Il tuo impatto Destinazione e gestione dei prodotti

• Assicurarsi che le esperienze siano fattibili e allineate agli standard del marchio di lusso
• Gestione dei prezzi, ROI e pianificazione delle capacità

• Assicurare che i prodotti riflettano le realtà a bordo (timing, demografie degli ospiti, considerazioni sulla mobilità)

• Monitorare il feedback degli ospiti e implementare azioni correttive Gestione finanziaria e delle prestazioni
• Prestito bilancio e rendimento delle entrate per le regioni assegnate
• Monitorare i margini, le tendenze del rimborso e il contributo a livello di viaggio
• Identificare le porte sottoperformanti e ottimizzare le offerte di conseguenza
• Partner con Finance e Analytics per report e dashboard Il tuo viaggio finora - 7–10+ anni di escursioni in crociera lungo la costa, gestione della destinazione o viaggio di lusso - Corso di laurea in Ospitalità, Turismo, Business o esperienza equivalente preferito. I tuoi essenziali - Forte esperienza di crociera a bordo e comprensione operativa - Conoscenza profonda dei porti e delle infrastrutture di destinazione - La conoscenza delle regioni dell'Alaska, dei Caraibi, del Sud America o dell'Asia è un forte vantaggio - Prove capacità di negoziazione e gestione finanziaria - Forte capacità analitiche e di comunicazione - Fluente in inglese; lingue aggiuntive sono un bene - Valido permesso di lavoro svizzero o idoneità al lavoro in Svizzera / permesso USA per la posizione di Miami A Explora Journeys, stiamo ridefinindo il viaggio oceanico di lusso - dove la scoperta, il benessere, e un profondo rispetto per i mari si uniscono in armonia. Cerchiamo professionisti appassionati che condividono la nostra visione di un modo più coinvolgente e trasformativo per scoprire le destinazioni più ispiranti del mondo dal mare. Sei pronto a trasformare la tua passione in qualcosa di straordinario? Unisciti a noi a Explora Journeys, dove un oceano di opportunità attende. Il vostro viaggio verso lo Stato della Mente Oceano inizia qui.

jobs.title: Brand Manager - Brand & Product

titleByLocale.it: Responsabile del marchio - Marchio e prodotto

jobs.description:
Where passion meets opportunity

Discover your journey into the extraordinary.

Your Purpose

Discover your journey into the extraordinary.

Explora Journeys is a vibrant, cosmopolitan, European luxury brand, imagined in the heart of Swiss hospitality in Geneva. Leveraging our parent company MSC Group’s hundreds of years of maritime expertise, our fleet of six luxury ships (four currently in the pipeline) are being built and designed in a totally different and unique way that will transform and redefine the cruise experience, creating a category of its own, appealing to the next generation of luxury travellers. 

Part of the global Marketing team and reporting directly to the Brand Director, this role plays a central role in safeguarding, shaping and activating the Explora Journeys brand across all touchpoints, with a particular focus on brand campaigns, the fleet and new brand developments.

Based at our headquarters in Geneva, this role sits at the intersection of brand strategy, product storytelling, and execution, working closely with Product, Design, Hotel Operations, Commercial, PR, Media, and Digital teams to bring the brand to life with clarity, consistency and emotional depth, across markets.

 

Your Impact

Brand Management & Governance

- Act as a core guardian of the Explora Journeys brand, supporting the Brand Director in the day to day management, development, and evolution of the brand.

- Ensure consistent application of brand identity, tone of voice, messaging, and visual language across all touchpoints, channels, and guest journeys.

- Lead the development, evolution and maintenance of brand guidelines, frameworks, and master toolkits, ensuring relevance, clarity, and scalability globally.

- Monitor brand execution across markets and partners, proactively identifying inconsistencies and working collaboratively with stakeholders to safeguard luxury and hospitality standards.

- Contribute to brand strategy initiatives, brand evolution projects, and internal brand education, strengthening brand understanding and alignment across the organisation.

Campaigns, Content & Brand Activation

- Lead the development and delivery of master brand and product campaigns, in line with brand strategy and commercial priorities.

- Oversee the creation of hero brand and product assets, including key visuals, copy frameworks, brochures, photography, and videography.

- Work closely with Media, Digital, and PR teams to ensure a coherent  and premium brand expression across paid, owned, and earned channels.

- Manage and curate brand, product and fleet content within DAM and PIM systems, ensuring accuracy, ease of use and global market adoption.

Product Marketing – Fleet & Onboard Experience

- Own and articulate the brand and product narrative for the Explora Journeys fleet, translating ship design, onboard experiences and service philosophy into compelling, clear, and guest-centric storytelling.

- Act as a key brand partner to Product, New Builds and Hotel Operations teams, supporting projects throughout the ship lifecycle; from early concept through delivery, launch and in-service evolution.

- Define and activate ship level propositions and concepts, onboard experiences, suite concepts, culinary, wellness and retail pillars, and service rituals.

- Ensure alignment between the onboard guest experience and the brand promise communicated to market.

Launch & Go to Market Coordination

- Support brand and product readiness for new brand initiatives, campaigns, ship launches, major milestones, and onboard innovations.

- Develop master launch toolkits to equip channels, markets, Sales, and PR with clear narratives, positioning and assets.

- Ensure consistency, clarity and brand alignment across all internal and external communications related to brand, fleet and product evolution.

Cross Functional Collaboration & Operational Excellence

- Act as a trusted brand partner across functions, fostering alignment between brand, product, commercial, and operational teams

descriptionByLocale.it:
Dove la passione incontra l'opportunità Scopri il tuo viaggio nello straordinario. Il tuo scopo Scopri il tuo viaggio nello straordinario. Explora Journeys è un marchio di lusso europeo vibrante, cosmopolita, immaginato nel cuore dell'ospitalità svizzera a Ginevra. Sfruttando le centinaia di anni di esperienza marittima della nostra società madre MSC Group, la nostra flotta di sei navi di lusso (quattro attualmente in cantiere) sono state costruite e progettate in modo totalmente diverso e unico che trasformeranno e ridefiniranno l'esperienza di crociera, creando una categoria propria, attraendo la prossima generazione di viaggiatori di lusso. Parte del team di Marketing globale e riportando direttamente al Brand Director, questo ruolo svolge un ruolo centrale nella salvaguardia, nella modellazione e nell'attivazione del marchio Explora Journeys in tutti i punti di contatto, con una particolare attenzione alle campagne di marca, alla flotta e ai nuovi sviluppi del marchio. Situato nella nostra sede di Ginevra, questo ruolo si trova all'intersezione della strategia di marca, della narrazione dei prodotti e dell'esecuzione, lavorando a stretto contatto con i team di Product, Design, Hotel Operations, Commercial, PR, Media e Digital per portare il marchio alla vita con chiarezza, consistenza e profondità emotiva, attraverso i mercati. Il tuo impatto Gestione e Governance dei marchi - Agire come tutore principale del marchio Explora Journeys, supportando il Brand Director nella gestione quotidiana, nello sviluppo e nell'evoluzione del marchio. - Assicurare l'applicazione coerente di identità di marca, tono di voce, messaggistica e linguaggio visivo in tutti i punti di contatto, canali e viaggi degli ospiti. - Condurre lo sviluppo, l'evoluzione e la manutenzione delle linee guida, dei framework e dei toolkit master, garantendo rilevanza, chiarezza e scalabilità a livello globale. - Monitorare l'esecuzione del marchio su mercati e partner, identificare proattivamente le incongruenze e lavorare in collaborazione con gli stakeholder per salvaguardare gli standard di lusso e ospitalità. - Contribuire a iniziative di strategia di marca, progetti di evoluzione del marchio e formazione interna del marchio, rafforzare la comprensione e l'allineamento del marchio in tutta l'organizzazione. Campagne, contenuti e attività di marca - Condurre lo sviluppo e la consegna di campagne di master brand e prodotti, in linea con la strategia del marchio e le priorità commerciali. - Superare la creazione di eroi e beni di prodotto, tra cui visivi chiave, quadri di copia, brochure, fotografia e videografia. - Lavorare a stretto contatto con i team Media, Digital e PR per garantire un'espressione coerente e premium del marchio attraverso canali pagati, di proprietà e guadagnati. - Gestire e curare i contenuti di marca, prodotto e flotta all'interno dei sistemi DAM e PIM, garantendo precisione, facilità d'uso e adozione di mercato globale. Marketing del prodotto – Fleet & Onboard Experience - Possedere e articolare la narrazione del marchio e del prodotto per la flotta Explora Journeys, traducendo il design delle navi, le esperienze a bordo e la filosofia di servizio in avvincente, chiaro, e guest-centric storytelling. - Agire come partner chiave del marchio per i team di Product, New Builds e Hotel Operations, supportando progetti in tutto il ciclo di vita della nave; dal concetto iniziale alla consegna, al lancio e all'evoluzione in-service. - Definire e attivare proposizioni e concetti a livello di nave, esperienze a bordo, concetti suite, pilastri culinari, benessere e vendita al dettaglio, e rituali di servizio. - Assicurare l'allineamento tra l'esperienza ospite a bordo e la promessa del marchio comunicata al mercato. Launch & Go to Market Coordination - Supporto del marchio e prontezza del prodotto per nuove iniziative di marca, campagne, lanci delle navi, grandi pietre miliari e innovazioni a bordo. - Sviluppare strumenti di lancio master per dotare canali, mercati, vendite e PR con chiare narrazioni, posizionamento e attività. - Assicurare coerenza, chiarezza e allineamento del marchio in tutte le comunicazioni interne ed esterne relative a marca, flotta ed evoluzione del prodotto. Collaborazione funzionale e eccellenza operativa - Agire come partner di marca di fiducia attraverso le funzioni, promuovendo l'allineamento tra brand, prodotto, commerciale e team operativi - Coordinare budget, fornitori, previsioni, ordini di acquisto e fatturazione relative alle iniziative di marca. - Equilibrare il marchio strategico pensando con le mani sull'esecuzione in un ambiente veloce. Il tuo viaggio finora - Laurea magistrale in Marketing, Brand Management, Product Marketing, o in un campo relativo. - 8+ anni di esperienza nella gestione del marchio e nella costruzione di campagne. - Esperienza prioritaria all'interno di lusso, premium o high-end di viaggio, ospitalità o marchi di consumatori fortemente preferito. - Esperienza comprovata che opera in un ambiente di quartier generale globale, gestione dei quadri di marca e dei beni master in tutti i mercati. - Esperienza di agenzie di gestione e partner creativi esterni. I tuoi essenziali - Esposizione al marketing del prodotto e ai prodotti basati sull'esperienza fisica (ship, hotel, resort o ambienti premium complessi altamente desiderabili). - Forte sensibilità creativa combinata con rigore operativo, attenzione ai dettagli e capacità di gestione degli stakeholder. - Comodo spostamento tra pensiero strategico del marchio e esecuzione dettagliata. - Fluente in inglese; lingue europee aggiuntive sono un forte vantaggio. A Explora Journeys, stiamo ridefinindo il viaggio oceanico di lusso - dove la scoperta, il benessere, e un profondo rispetto per i mari si uniscono in armonia. 
• Cerchiamo professionisti appassionati che condividono la nostra visione di un modo più coinvolgente e trasformativo per scoprire le destinazioni più ispiranti del mondo dal mare. Sei pronto a trasformare la tua passione in qualcosa di straordinario? Unisciti a noi a Explora Journeys, dove un oceano di opportunità attende. Il vostro viaggio verso lo Stato della Mente Oceano inizia qui.

descriptionByLocale.fr: Où la passion rencontre des opportunités Découvrez votre voyage dans l'extraordinaire. Votre but Découvrez votre voyage dans l'extraordinaire. Explora Journeys est une marque de luxe européenne dynamique et cosmopolite, imaginée au cœur de l'hospitalité suisse à Genève. Tirant parti de notre société mère MSC Group de centaines d'années d'expertise maritime, notre flotte de six navires de luxe (quatre actuellement dans le pipeline) sont en cours de construction et de conception d'une manière totalement différente et unique qui transformera et redéfinira l'expérience de croisière, créant une catégorie propre, attrayant pour la prochaine génération de voyageurs de luxe. Faisant partie de l'équipe mondiale du marketing et relevant directement du directeur de la marque, ce rôle joue un rôle central dans la sauvegarde, l'élaboration et l'activation de la marque Explora Journeys sur tous les points de contact, en mettant l'accent sur les campagnes de marque, la flotte et les nouveaux développements de la marque. Basé à notre siège social à Genève, ce rôle se situe à l'intersection de la stratégie de la marque, du conte de produits et de l'exécution, en travaillant en étroite collaboration avec les équipes Product, Design, Hotel Operations, Commercial, PR, Media et Digital pour donner vie à la marque avec clarté, cohérence et profondeur émotionnelle, sur les marchés. Votre impact Gestion et gouvernance de la marque - Agir en tant que gardien principal de la marque Explora Journeys, en soutenant le directeur de la marque dans la gestion quotidienne, le développement et l'évolution de la marque. - Assurer une application cohérente de l'identité de la marque, du ton de la voix, de la messagerie et du langage visuel sur tous les points de contact, canaux et voyages des invités. - Diriger l'élaboration, l'évolution et la mise à jour de lignes directrices, de cadres et de trousses d'outils, en assurant la pertinence, la clarté et l'évolutivité à l'échelle mondiale. - Surveiller l'exécution de la marque à travers les marchés et les partenaires, identifier proactivement les incohérences et travailler en collaboration avec les intervenants pour protéger les normes de luxe et d'accueil. - Contribuer aux initiatives de stratégie de marque, aux projets d'évolution de marque et à l'éducation interne de la marque, en renforçant la compréhension et l'alignement de la marque dans l'ensemble de l'organisation. Campagnes, contenu et activation de la marque - Diriger l'élaboration et la livraison de campagnes de marque et de produit, conformément à la stratégie de la marque et aux priorités commerciales. - Superviser la création d'actifs de marque et de produit héros, y compris les visuels clés, les cadres de copie, les brochures, la photographie et la vidéographie. - Oui. Travailler en étroite collaboration avec les équipes des médias, du numérique et des relations publiques afin d'assurer une expression cohérente et haut de gamme de la marque sur les canaux payants, possédés et gagnés. - Gérer et guérir le contenu de la marque, du produit et de la flotte au sein des systèmes DAM et PIM, en assurant la précision, la facilité d'utilisation et l'adoption du marché mondial. Marketing des produits – Flotte & Expérience à bord - Propre et articuler le récit de la marque et du produit pour la flotte Explora Journeys, traduisant la conception des navires, les expériences à bord et la philosophie de service en récits convaincants, clairs et centrés sur les invités. - Agir en tant que partenaire clé des équipes Product, New Builds et Hotel Operations, en soutenant des projets tout au long du cycle de vie du navire; du concept précoce à la livraison, au lancement et à l'évolution en service. - Définir et activer des propositions et des concepts de niveau navire, des expériences à bord, des concepts de suite, des piliers culinaires, de bien-être et de détail, et des rituels de service. - Assurer l'alignement entre l'expérience des invités à bord et la promesse de marque communiquée au marché. Lancement & Aller à la coordination du marché - Soutenir la préparation des marques et des produits pour de nouvelles initiatives de marque, campagnes, lancements de navires, jalons majeurs et innovations à bord. - Élaborer des outils de lancement pour équiper les canaux, les marchés, les ventes et les relations publiques de récits, de positionnements et d'actifs clairs. - Assurer la cohérence, la clarté et l'alignement de la marque dans toutes les communications internes et externes liées à l'évolution de la marque, du parc automobile et du produit. Collaboration interfonctionnelle et excellence opérationnelle - Agir en tant que partenaire de marque fiable pour toutes les fonctions, favoriser l'harmonisation entre les équipes de marque, de produit, commerciale et opérationnelle - Coordonner les budgets, les fournisseurs, les prévisions, les commandes et la facturation liées aux initiatives de marque. - Équilibrer la pensée stratégique de marque avec l'exécution mains sur mains dans un environnement à rythme rapide. Votre voyage jusqu'à présent - Master en marketing, gestion de marque, marketing de produits, ou un domaine connexe. - 8+ ans d'expérience dans la gestion de marque et la construction de campagnes. - Expérience antérieure dans le luxe, les voyages haut de gamme, l'hospitalité ou les marques de consommateurs fortement préférées. - Expérience éprouvée dans un environnement mondial de siège, gestion des cadres de marques et maîtrise des actifs sur les marchés. - Expérience des agences de gestion et des partenaires créatifs externes. Vos essentiels - Exposition à la commercialisation de produits et à des produits basés sur l'expérience physique (navires, hôtels, stations balnéaires ou environnements complexes haut de gamme hautement souhaitables). - Une forte sensibilité créative associée à une rigueur opérationnelle, une attention aux détails et des compétences en gestion des intervenants. - Un déplacement confortable entre la réflexion stratégique de marque et l'exécution détaillée. - La maîtrise de l'anglais; d'autres langues européennes présentent un fort avantage. À Explora Journeys, nous redéfinissons le voyage maritime de luxe, où la découverte, le bien-être et le profond respect des mers s'unissent en harmonie. Nous recherchons des professionnels passionnés qui partagent notre vision d'une façon plus immersive et transformatrice de découvrir les destinations les plus inspirantes du monde par la mer. Êtes-vous prêt à transformer votre passion en quelque chose d'extraordinaire ? Rejoignez-nous à Explora Journeys, où un océan d'opportunités vous attend. Votre voyage vers l'état de l'océan commence ici.

jobs.title: Multimedia and AV Manager
jobs.description:
Your Purpose

Lead and define the strategic planning, deployment, and operational management of the Multimedia Department while supporting audiovisual (AV) systems across fleet and corporate infrastructure. Oversee fleet multimedia content, technology innovation, and AV operations to maximise guest experience and maintain consistent brand standards. Working closely with global teams, new build projects, and external stakeholders, drive collaboration across Entertainment, Marketing, IT, Digital, Production, and technical functions to deliver seamless digital experiences. The AV scope expands beyond traditional multimedia, supporting wider technical initiatives across the Entertainment division — including theatrical and guest activities — and acting as a key bridge between operational entertainment needs and technical delivery teams.

Your Impact

- Manage multimedia and AV operations, including the design, implementation, optimisation, and lifecycle management of audio, video, broadcast, digital signage, and content delivery systems.

- Partner with shoreside and onboard technical teams to ensure equipment reliability, structured maintenance planning, operational scheduling, and agreed repair strategies across the fleet.

- Lead cross-functional initiatives with Entertainment, Marketing, IT, Digital, Production, and technical stakeholders to deliver innovative onboard and shoreside guest experiences.

- Act as the primary liaison between Entertainment, Production vendors, external contractors, and the Show and Multimedia department, translating creative and operational requirements into scalable technical solutions.

- Advise and support New Build projects on multimedia and AV technical requirements, ensuring future-proof, sustainable technology integration.

- Collaborate with Brand, Marketing, and content providers to develop, brief, and implement new ship-based media content strategies and onboard marketing initiatives.

- Define and project manage operational workflows and delivery plans for Entertainment and onboard marketing content across shipboard screens and digital platforms.

- Oversee vendor relationships, procurement activities, and associated budgets to maintain cost efficiency while ensuring technical excellence.

- Monitor and evaluate global technology trends to keep fleet systems innovative, competitive, and aligned with evolving guest expectations.

- Develop, maintain, and continuously improve standard operating procedures and technical standards, ensuring fleetwide consistency, safety, and operational efficiency in line with corporate Entertainment guidelines.

- Supervise, appraise, and mentor ship-based and touring technicians globally, ensuring compliance with safety, maritime, and corporate policies.

- Support live events, broadcasting, corporate communications, and multimedia initiatives through strategic planning combined with hands-on technical leadership.

- Manage and govern visual content provided by internal and external partners for broadcast across onboard platforms.

Your Journey so far

- Extensive experience within cruise environments is a must.

- Senior operational and managerial experience within the Entertainment industry.

- Mother tongue English; Italian, German, or Spanish advantageous.

- Strong background in broadcasting, web, TV, theatrical production, or digital media operations with managerial responsibility.

- Knowledge of enterprise Content Management Systems and digital platforms.

- Solid IT literacy with understanding of systems architecture and AV integration.

- Full understanding of LES systems within the maritime industry.

- Advanced computer literacy (Microsoft Office, Adobe Creative Suite, and CAD software).

- Strong project management and stakeholder coordination skills.

- Proven ability to work autonomously, solve complex operational challenges, and manage global teams.

- International mindset with experience supporting mixed-nationality audiences and global operations.

- Willingness to travel extensively.

Your Essentials

- SWISS Resident or Visa Holder

Our commitment

We are committed to building a future that values diverse perspectives, embraces the world beyond borders, and fosters an inclusive environment where every individual feels valued, respected and empowered to be their authentic selves. Our commitment extends to taking meaningful, measurable actions that have a long-term positive impact on our guests, our employees and our planet.

Ready to turn your passion into something extraordinary? Join us at MSC Cruises, where new opportunities await. Apply today to be part of a global team that is pushing boundaries and achieving something remarkable. Your journey starts here!

Your Purpose

Lead and define the strategic planning, deployment, and operational management of the Multimedia Department while supporting audiovisual (AV) systems across fleet and corporate infrastructure. Oversee fleet multimedia content, technology innovation, and AV operations to maximise guest experience and maintain consistent brand standards. Working closely with global teams, new build projects, and external stakeholders, drive collaboration across Entertainment, Marketing, IT, Digital, Production, and technical functions to deliver seamless digital experiences. The AV scope expands beyond traditional multimedia, supporting wider technical initiatives across the Entertainment division — including theatrical and guest activities — and acting as a key bridge between operational entertainment needs and technical delivery teams.

Your Impact

- Manage multimedia and AV operations, including the design, implementation, optimisation, and lifecycle management of audio, video, broadcast, digital signage, and content delivery systems.

- Partner with shoreside and onboard technical teams to ensure equipment reliability, structured maintenance planning, operational scheduling, and agreed repair strategies across the fleet.

- Lead cross-functional initiatives with Entertainment, Marketing, IT, Digital, Production, and technical stakeholders to deliver innovative onboard and shoreside guest experiences.

- Act as the primary liaison between Entertainment, Production vendors, external contractors, and the Show and Multimedia department, translating creative and operational requirements into scalable technical solutions.

- Advise and support New Build projects on multimedia and AV technical requirements, ensuring future-proof, sustainable technology integration.

- Collaborate with Brand, Marketing, and content providers to develop, brief, and implement new ship-based media content strategies and onboard marketing initiatives.

- Define and project manage operational workflows and delivery plans for Entertainment and onboard marketing content across shipboard screens and digital platforms.

- Oversee vendor relationships, procurement activities, and associated budgets to maintain cost efficiency while ensuring technical excellence.

- Monitor and evaluate global technology trends to keep fleet systems innovative, competitive, and aligned with evolving guest expectations.

- Develop, maintain, and continuously improve standard operating procedures and technical standards, ensuring fleetwide consistency, safety, and operational efficiency in line with corporate Entertainment guidelines.

- Supervise, appraise, and mentor ship-based and touring technicians globally, ensuring compliance with safety, maritime, and corporate policies.

- Support live events, broadcasting, corporate communications, and multimedia initiatives through strategic planning combined with hands-on technical leadership.

- Manage and govern visual content provided by internal and external partners for broadcast across onboard platforms.

Your Journey so far

- Extensive experience within cruise environments is a must.

- Senior operational and managerial experience within the Entertainment industry.

- Mother tongue English; Italian, German, or Spanish advantageous.

- Strong background in broadcasting, web, TV, theatrical production, or digital media operations with managerial responsibility.

- Knowledge of enterprise Content Management Systems and digital platforms.

- Solid IT literacy with understanding of systems architecture and AV integration.

- Full understanding of LES systems within the maritime industry.

- Advanced computer literacy (Microsoft Office, Adobe Creative Suite, and CAD software).

- Strong project management and stakeholder coordination skills.

- Proven ability to work autonomously, solve complex operational challenges, and manage global teams.

- International mindset with experience supporting mixed-nationality audiences and global operations.

- Willingness to travel extensively.

Your Essentials

- SWISS Resident or Visa Holder

Our commitment

We are committed to building a future that values diverse perspectives, embraces the world beyond borders, and fosters an inclusive environment where every individual feels valued, respected and empowered to be their authentic selves. Our commitment extends to taking meaningful, measurable actions that have a long-term positive impact on our guests, our employees and our planet.

Ready to turn your passion into something extraordinary? Join us at MSC Cruises, where new opportunities await. Apply today to be part of a global team that is pushing boundaries and achieving something remarkable. Your journey starts here!

jobs.title: SPA Product Manager
jobs.description:
Your Purpose

The SPA Product Manager is responsible for the strategic development, management, and optimization of spa products, treatments, and retail offerings. This role ensures that all spa products align with brand positioning, guest expectations, and commercial objectives, while driving revenue, innovation, and operational excellence across the spa portfolio.

Your Impact

- Define and execute the spa product strategy, including treatments, retail products, and wellness concepts, in line with brand standards and business goals

- Manage the full product lifecycle, from concept development and supplier selection to launch, performance  monitoring, and optimization

- Collaborate with internal stakeholders (Spa Operations, Marketing, Training, Procurement, Finance) to ensure seamless product implementation

- Lead supplier relationships, and performance reviews.

- Analyze product performance through KPIs, guest feedback, and financial results, and implement datadriven improvements

- Ensure all products comply with regulatory, safety, and brand standards across all locations.

- Support the development of pricing strategies, promotions, and revenue-driving initiatives.

- Work closely with Training teams to ensure therapists and staff are fully trained on products and treatments.

- Monitor market trends, and innovations within the spa and wellness industry to maintain a competitive offering.

- Support new openings, refurbishments, and special projects related to spa product development.

Your Journey so far

- Strong commercial and analytical mindset with proven experience in product performance management

- Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills

- Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously in a fast-paced environment

- Strategic thinking combined with hands-on execution

- Strong negotiation and supplier management skills

- High attention to detail with a focus on quality and guest experience

- Proven experience in spa, wellness, beauty, or hospitality product management

- Strong understanding of spa operations, treatments, and retail environments

- Experience working with premium or luxury brands preferre

Your Essentials

- 10-15 years of experience in SPA and Wellness including Medispa treatments , retail products, and wellness concepts,

- Proven experience in managining the full product lifecycle, from concept development and supplier selection, legal requirements, launch, performance monitoring, and optimization.

- Excellent communication and leadership skills especially in guiding large teams and influencing stakeholders.

- Fluency in English is mandatory any other language is a plus.

- Strong leadership skills to oversee SPA operations across multiple locations.

- Experience with project management financial analysis and revenue management in the wellness or hospitality industry.

- Ability to work effectively with departments such as Marketing Guest Services and Revenue Management to create a cohesive wellness experience for guests.

- Swiss nationality or right to work in Switzerland.

Our commitment

We are committed to building a future that values diverse perspectives, embraces the world beyond borders, and fosters an inclusive environment where every individual feels valued, respected and empowered to be their authentic selves. Our commitment extends to taking meaningful, measurable actions that have a long-term positive impact on our guests, our employees and our planet.

Ready to turn your passion into something extraordinary? Join us at MSC Cruises, where new opportunities await. Apply today to be part of a global team that is pushing boundaries and achieving something remarkable. Your journey starts here!

descriptionByLocale.it: Il tuo scopo SPA Product Manager è responsabile dello sviluppo strategico, della gestione e dell'ottimizzazione dei prodotti spa, dei trattamenti e delle offerte di vendita al dettaglio. Questo ruolo garantisce che tutti i prodotti spa si allineano con il posizionamento del marchio, le aspettative degli ospiti e gli obiettivi commerciali, mentre guidano i ricavi, l'innovazione e l'eccellenza operativa in tutto il portafoglio spa. Il tuo impatto - Definire ed eseguire la strategia del prodotto spa, compresi i trattamenti, i prodotti di vendita al dettaglio e i concetti di benessere, in linea con gli standard del marchio e gli obiettivi aziendali - Gestire il ciclo di vita completo del prodotto, dallo sviluppo del concetto e dalla selezione dei fornitori al lancio, monitoraggio delle prestazioni e ottimizzazione - Collaborare con gli stakeholder interni (Operazioni Spagna, Marketing, Formazione, Procurement, Finanza) per garantire l'implementazione dei prodotti senza soluzione di continuità - Lead rapporti dei fornitori e recensioni sulle prestazioni. - Analizzare le prestazioni del prodotto attraverso KPI, feedback degli ospiti e risultati finanziari, e implementare miglioramenti datadriven - Assicurarsi che tutti i prodotti siano conformi alle normative, alla sicurezza e agli standard di marca in tutte le sedi. - Sostenere lo sviluppo di strategie di prezzi, promozioni e iniziative di gestione dei ricavi. - Lavorare a stretto contatto con i team di formazione per garantire che i terapeuti e il personale siano pienamente formati su prodotti e trattamenti. - Monitorare le tendenze del mercato e le innovazioni all'interno del settore spa e benessere per mantenere un'offerta competitiva. - Sostenere nuove aperture, ristrutturazioni e progetti speciali relativi allo sviluppo di prodotti spa. Il tuo viaggio finora - Forte mentalità commerciale e analitica con comprovata esperienza nella gestione delle prestazioni del prodotto - Eccellente capacità di gestione e comunicazione degli stakeholder - Capacità di gestire più progetti contemporaneamente in un ambiente di velocità - pensiero strategico combinato con l'esecuzione manuale - Forte capacità di negoziazione e gestione dei fornitori - Alta attenzione ai dettagli con un focus sulla qualità e l'esperienza degli ospiti - Esperienza comprovata in spa, benessere, bellezza o gestione del prodotto dell'ospitalità - Forte comprensione delle operazioni di spa, dei trattamenti e degli ambienti di vendita al dettaglio - Esperienza di lavoro con marchi premium o di lusso preferisconore I tuoi essenziali - 10-15 anni di esperienza in SPA e Wellness tra cui trattamenti Medispa, prodotti di vendita al dettaglio e concetti di benessere, - Esperienza comprovata nell'agitare il ciclo di vita completo del prodotto, dalla selezione di concetti e fornitori, requisiti legali, lancio, monitoraggio delle prestazioni e ottimizzazione. - Ottima capacità di comunicazione e leadership, soprattutto nel guidare grandi team e influenzare gli stakeholder. - La fluenza in inglese è obbligatoria qualsiasi altra lingua è un plus. - Forte capacità di leadership per supervisionare le operazioni SPA in più posizioni. - Esperienza con la gestione del progetto analisi finanziaria e gestione dei ricavi nel settore del benessere o dell'ospitalità. - Capacità di lavorare efficacemente con dipartimenti come Marketing Guest Services e Revenue Management per creare un'esperienza di benessere coesa per gli ospiti. - Nazionalità svizzera o diritto di lavoro in Svizzera. Il nostro impegno Ci impegniamo a costruire un futuro che valorizza diverse prospettive, abbraccia il mondo oltre i confini, e promuove un ambiente inclusivo in cui ogni individuo si sente valorizzato, rispettato e potenziato per essere il proprio sé autentico. Il nostro impegno si estende a intraprendere azioni significative e misurabili che hanno un impatto positivo a lungo termine sui nostri ospiti, sui nostri dipendenti e sul nostro pianeta. Pronto a trasformare la tua passione in qualcosa di straordinario? Unisciti a noi a MSC Crociere, dove attendono nuove opportunità. Applicare oggi per essere parte di un team globale che sta spingendo i confini e raggiungere qualcosa di notevole. Il tuo viaggio inizia qui!

descriptionByLocale.de:
Ihr Ziel Der SPA Product Manager ist verantwortlich für die strategische Entwicklung, Verwaltung und Optimierung von Spa-Produkten, Behandlungen und Einzelhandelsangeboten. Diese Rolle sorgt dafür, dass alle Spa-Produkte mit Markenpositionierung, Gasterwartungen und kommerziellen Zielen übereinstimmen und Umsatz, Innovation und operative Exzellenz im gesamten Spa-Portfolio vorantreiben. Ihre Auswirkungen - Definieren und führen Sie die Spa-Produktstrategie, einschließlich Behandlungen, Retail-Produkte und Wellness-Konzepte, im Einklang mit Markenstandards und Geschäftszielen - Verwalten Sie den gesamten Produktlebenszyklus, von der Konzeptentwicklung und Lieferantenauswahl bis zum Start, Leistungsüberwachung und Optimierung - Zusammenarbeit mit internen Stakeholdern (Spa Operations, Marketing, Training, Beschaffung, Finanzen), um eine nahtlose Produktumsetzung zu gewährleisten - Führen Sie Lieferantenbeziehungen und Leistungsbewertungen. - Analyse der Produktleistung durch Kennzahlen, Gäste-Feedback und Finanzergebnisse und Implementierung datengetriebener Verbesserungen - Stellen Sie sicher, dass alle Produkte den regulatorischen, Sicherheits- und Markenstandards an allen Standorten entsprechen. - Unterstützung bei der Entwicklung von Preisstrategien, Förderungen und geldtreibenden Initiativen. - Arbeiten Sie eng mit Trainingsteams zusammen, um sicherzustellen, dass Therapeuten und Mitarbeiter vollständig auf Produkte und Behandlungen trainiert werden. - Überwachen Sie Markttrends und Innovationen in der Wellness- und Wellnessbranche, um ein wettbewerbsfähiges Angebot zu erhalten. - Unterstützung neuer Öffnungen, Sanierungen und Sonderprojekte im Zusammenhang mit der Entwicklung von Spa-Produkten. Ihre Reise so weit - Starke kommerzielle und analytische Denkweise mit nachgewiesener Erfahrung im Produktleistungsmanagement - Ausgezeichnete Stakeholder Management und Kommunikationsfähigkeiten - Fähigkeit, mehrere Projekte gleichzeitig in einer schnelllebigen Umgebung zu verwalten - Strategisches Denken kombiniert mit Hand-on-Ausführung - Starke Verhandlungs- und Lieferantenmanagementfähigkeiten - Hohe Liebe zum Detail mit Fokus auf Qualität und Gasterlebnis - Bewährte Erfahrung in Spa, Wellness, Schönheit oder Gastfreundschaft Produktmanagement - Starkes Verständnis von Spa-Betrieben, Behandlungen und Einzelhandelsumgebungen - Erfahrungen mit Premium- oder Luxusmarken Ihre Essenzen - 10-15 Jahre Erfahrung in SPA und Wellness einschließlich Medispa Behandlungen, Einzelhandelsprodukte und Wellness-Konzepte, - Erprobte Erfahrung in der Konzeption des gesamten Produktlebenszyklus, von der Konzeptentwicklung und Lieferantenauswahl, rechtlichen 
• Anforderungen, Start, Leistungsüberwachung und Optimierung. - Ausgezeichnete Kommunikations- und Führungsfähigkeiten vor allem bei der Führung großer Teams und der Beeinflussung von Interessenvertretern. - Fluency in English ist obligatorisch jede andere Sprache ist ein Plus. - Starke Führungsfähigkeiten, um SPA-Operationen über mehrere Standorte zu überwachen. - Erfahrung mit Projektmanagement Finanzanalyse und Umsatzmanagement in der Wellness- oder Gastfreundschaftsbranche. - Fähigkeit, effektiv mit Abteilungen wie Marketing Guest Services und Revenue Management zu arbeiten, um ein zusammenhängendes Wellness-Erlebnis für Gäste zu schaffen. - Schweizer Staatsangehörigkeit oder Recht auf Arbeit in der Schweiz. Unser Engagement Wir sind verpflichtet, eine Zukunft aufzubauen, die unterschiedliche Perspektiven wertet, die Welt jenseits der Grenzen umarmt und eine integrative Umgebung fördert, in der jeder Mensch sich wertschätzt, respektiert und befähigt fühlt, seine authentischen Selbst zu sein. Unser Engagement erstreckt sich auf sinnvolle, messbare Handlungen, die langfristig positive Auswirkungen auf unsere Gäste, unsere Mitarbeiter und unseren Planeten haben. Bereit, Ihre Leidenschaft in etwas Außergewöhnliches zu verwandeln? Besuchen Sie uns bei MSC Cruises, wo neue Möglichkeiten erwartet werden. Wenden Sie sich heute an, Teil eines globalen Teams zu sein, das Grenzen drängt und etwas bemerkenswertes erreicht. Deine Reise beginnt hier!
descriptionByLocale.fr: Votre but Le responsable des produits SPA est responsable du développement stratégique, de la gestion et de l'optimisation des produits spa, des traitements et des offres de détail. Ce rôle garantit que tous les produits de spa s'harmonisent avec le positionnement de la marque, les attentes des clients et les objectifs commerciaux, tout en favorisant les revenus, l'innovation et l'excellence opérationnelle dans l'ensemble du portefeuille de spa. Votre impact - Définir et exécuter la stratégie des produits spa, y compris les traitements, les produits de détail et les concepts de bien-être, conformément aux normes de la marque et aux objectifs commerciaux - Gérer le cycle de vie complet du produit, du développement de concepts et de la sélection des fournisseurs au lancement, au suivi des performances et à l'optimisation - Collaborer avec les intervenants internes (exploitation, marketing, formation, approvisionnement, finances) pour assurer une mise en oeuvre transparente du produit - Relations avec les fournisseurs principaux et examens de performance. - Analyser la performance des produits à l'aide des ICR, des commentaires des clients et des résultats financiers, et mettre en œuvre des améliorations axées sur les données - S'assurer que tous les produits respectent les normes réglementaires, de sécurité et de marque dans tous les endroits. - Appuyer l'élaboration de stratégies de tarification, de promotions et d'initiatives en matière de revenus. - Collaborer étroitement avec les équipes de formation pour s'assurer que les thérapeutes et le personnel sont pleinement formés aux produits et aux traitements. - Surveiller les tendances du marché et les innovations au sein de l'industrie du spa et du bien-être pour maintenir une offre concurrentielle. - Soutenir les nouvelles ouvertures, rénovations et projets spéciaux liés au développement de produits de spa. Votre voyage jusqu'à présent - Forte mentalité commerciale et analytique avec une expérience prouvée dans la gestion de la performance des produits - Excellentes compétences en gestion des parties prenantes et en communication - Capacité à gérer plusieurs projets simultanément dans un environnement rapide - Pensée stratégique combinée avec exécution pratique - Fortes compétences en négociation et gestion des fournisseurs - Une grande attention aux détails avec un accent sur la qualité et l'expérience des invités - Expérience éprouvée en spa, bien-être, beauté ou gestion de produits d'accueil - Bonne compréhension des opérations de spa, des traitements et des environnements de vente au détail - Expérience de travail avec les marques premium ou de luxe préfèrent Vos essentiels - 10-15 ans d'expérience en SPA et Wellness comprenant des traitements Medispa, des produits de détail et des concepts de bien-être, - Expérience éprouvée dans la gestion du cycle de vie complet du produit, depuis le développement de concepts et la sélection des fournisseurs, les exigences légales, le lancement, le suivi des performances et l'optimisation. - Excellentes compétences en communication et leadership, notamment en guidant les grandes équipes et en influençant les parties prenantes. - La maîtrise de l'anglais est obligatoire toute autre langue est un plus. - De solides compétences en leadership pour superviser les opérations de SPA dans plusieurs endroits. - Expérience en gestion de projet analyse financière et gestion des revenus dans l'industrie du bien-être ou de l'accueil. - Capacité de travailler efficacement avec des ministères comme Marketing Guest Services et Revenue Management pour créer une expérience de bien-être cohésive pour les clients. - La nationalité suisse ou le droit de travailler en Suisse. Notre engagement Nous sommes déterminés à bâtir un avenir qui valorise les diverses perspectives, embrasse le monde au-delà des frontières et favorise un environnement inclusif où chaque individu se sent valorisé, respecté et habilité à être lui-même authentique. Notre engagement s'étend à prendre des mesures significatives et mesurables qui ont un impact positif à long terme sur nos invités, nos employés et notre planète. Prêt à transformer votre passion en quelque chose d'extraordinaire ? Rejoignez-nous au MSC Cruises, où de nouvelles opportunités attendent. Appliquer aujourd'hui pour faire partie d'une équipe mondiale qui repousse les frontières et réalise quelque chose de remarquable. Votre voyage commence ici !

jobs.title: Casino Slots and Technical Operations Manager

titleByLocale.it: Responsabile delle Slot e delle Operazioni Tecniche del Casinò
titleByLocale.en: Casino Slots and Technical Operations Manager
titleByLocale.de: Casino Slots and Technical Operations Manager
titleByLocale.fr: Casino Slots and Technical Operations Manager

jobs.description:
Your Purpose

Lead Onboard Casino Technical teams, ensuring smooth operations, maintaining high standards of service, and maximising revenue generation. As a Casino Slot and Technical Operations Manager, you will be responsible for monitoring slot machine performance, analysing gaming data, and implementing strategies to enhance player satisfaction and profitability. Your role will involve regular inspections and maintenance scheduling to ensure all slot machines are functioning correctly and efficiently. You will also be responsible for managing inventory, ordering new equipment, and coordinating installations and upgrades. You will be expected to stay updated on industry trends and emerging technologies, proactively adapting operations to maintain compliance and competitive advantage.

Your Impact

• Oversee all technical projects and actively participate in their implementation. Maintain an excellent line of communication with the shore and ship technical department to ensure all casino projects are deployed according to schedule and comply to the company’s technical and safety standards.
• Assist with budgeting, forecasting and revenue analysis.
• Manage budgets, control costs, and optimise resource allocation.
• Support and guide onboard Casino management team on each vessel through constant communication and regular ship operational visits. Discuss any areas of concern specific to the Operation and brand specific product, and similarly address points of commendation.
• Provide accurate and objective assessment of onboard Casino operations and personnel.
• Revenue analysis, identifying trends with the ability to create structured solutions to increase or enhance revenue streams. Explore new ways of increasing existing revenue and /or improving current working practices, whilst at the same time maintaining a high technical and security standard onboard our ships.
• Isolate areas falling below standard with members of the Casino Shipboard management team.
• Training of all management teams in Slot Revenue, Security and Surveillance.
• Confirm that security measures meet minimum requirements.
• Provide troubleshooting support and advice via email to shipboard technical teams.
• Assess, evaluate and review data for organizing projects and/or providing directions on activities, tasks or processes in accordance with company guidelines.

Your Journey so far

• Minimum 5 years of experience in casino slot operations management.
• Previous experience working on a cruise ship is mandatory.

Your Essentials

• Strong knowledge of gaming regulations and compliance requirements.
• Excellent leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills.
• Proficiency in analysing gaming data and financial reports.
• Ability to manage budgets, control costs, and optimize resources.

Our commitment

We are committed to building a future that values diverse perspectives, embraces the world beyond borders, and fosters an inclusive environment where every individual feels valued, respected and empowered to be their authentic selves. Our commitment extends to taking meaningful, measurable actions that have a long-term positive impact on our guests, our employees and our planet.

Ready to turn your passion into something extraordinary? Join us at MSC Cruises, where new opportunities await. Apply today to be part of a global team that is pushing boundaries and achieving something remarkable. Your journey starts here!

jobs.title: Experience Development & Delivery Manager - New Builds

titleByLocale.it: Experience Development & Delivery Manager - Nuove Costruzioni
titleByLocale.en: Experience Development & Delivery Manager - New Builds
titleByLocale.fr: Experience Development & Delivery Manager - Nouvelles constructions

jobs.description:
Your Purpose

Do you excel at turning complexity into clarity? Are you energized by shaping ideas, challenging assumptions, and amplifying a leader’s impact?
We are seeking a New Builds Development & Delivery Manager who will act as an extension of the Senior Manager of Concept Innovation, enhancing strategic thinking, improving decision‑making speed, and helping bring robust, high-quality concepts to senior leadership.
This role is not operational and not a presentation-updating position. It is a partnership role, designed for someone who can think critically, structure ambiguous problems, challenge insights, and support the development of transformational guest experience concepts.You will collaborate closely with stakeholders across Experience, Retail, Marketing, Newbuild, and Strategy, ensuring concepts are analytically sound, insight-driven, and aligned with the company expectations. You’ll gain exposure to strategic discussions, influence senior decision-making, and drive clarity across innovation workstreams.
If you are a sharp thinker, a natural challenger, and a trusted partner able to elevate the work of others, this is the role for you

Your Impact

Strategic Support & Thought Partnership

- Act as a direct strategic partner to the Senior Manager, helping structure thinking, frame problems, and sharpen concept narratives.

- Participate in or lead selected meetings on behalf of Guest Experience Innovation

- Prepare strategic briefs, decision frameworks, and synthesis documents for SVP-level conversations.

Narrative Building & Executive-Ready Communication

- Craft clear, concise, and strategically sound storytelling materials for leadership forums

- Transform complex information into high-impact narratives.

- Support leadership in preparing for SVP/EVP/Executive Committee discussions.

Cross-Functional Collaboration

- Engage with Experience, Entertainment, Retail, Marketing, Newbuild, Strategy, and Operations teams to gather insights and shape concepts.

- Lead the development and delivery of new entertainment concepts, experiences, and spaces across our fleet.

- Act as the key link between creative partners, operations, and corporate functions, ensuring alignment and buy-in at every stage.

Project & Stakeholder Management

- Drive clarity in workstreams by structuring timelines, identifying decision points, and anticipating risks.

- Follow up with stakeholders to ensure progress and alignment.

- Elevate issues early and propose mitigation scenarios.

Your Journey so far

- 5–8 years in strategy, innovation, business design, consulting, or strategic project management.

- Experience in hospitality, cruise, retail, consumer goods, or guest experience is a strong plus.

- Strong background in designing and executing guest-focused experiences, from concept to delivery.

- A balance of creativity and operational know-how, able to dream big and deliver practically.

- Proven track record in managing complex, cross-functional teams (operations, creative, marketing, sales, revenue, communications), with the ability to unite diverse perspectives around a single vision.

- Excellent knowledge of modern visual communication tools (Canva, Adobe Suite, AI-driven creative platforms) to produce compelling visual documents and storytelling assets beyond traditional slide decks.

- Excellent relationship-building skills; able to inspire, influence, and connect across diverse teams.

- Strong storytelling and presentation skills, with confidence at the executive level.

- Ability to travel 20-30% of the time.

- Fluent English; additional languages a plus.

Your Essentials

- Excellent knowledge of modern visual communication tools (Canva, Adobe Suite, AI-driven creative platforms) to produce compelling visual documents and storytelling assets beyond traditional slide decks.

- Excellent relationship-building skills; able to inspire, influence, and connect across diverse teams.

- Strong storytelling and presentation skills, with confidence at the executive level.

- Proficiency in Excel, PowerPoint, and Outlook.

- Ability to travel 20-30% of the time.

- Fluent English; additional languages a plus

- EU Passport or right to work in Switzerland.

Our commitment

We are committed to building a future that values diverse perspectives, embraces the world beyond borders, and fosters an inclusive environment where every individual feels valued, respected and empowered to be their authentic selves. Our commitment extends to taking meaningful, measurable actions that have a long-term positive impact on our guests, our employees and our planet.

Ready to turn your passion into something extraordinary? Join us at MSC Cruises, where new opportunities await. Apply today to be part of a global team that is pushing boundaries and achieving something remarkable. Your journey starts here!

descriptionByLocale.it:
Il tuo scopo eccelle nel trasformare la complessità in chiarezza? Sei eccitato plasmando idee, presupposti stimolanti e amplificando l’impatto di un leader? 
• Stiamo cercando un New Builds Development & Delivery Manager che agirà come estensione del Senior Manager of Concept Innovation, migliorando il pensiero strategico, migliorando la velocità decisionale e aiutando a portare concetti robusti e di alta qualità alla leadership senior. Questo ruolo non è operativo e non è una posizione di presentazione. Si tratta di un ruolo di partnership, progettato per qualcuno che può pensare criticamente, strutturare problemi ambigui, sfidare intuizioni e sostenere lo sviluppo di concetti di esperienza degli ospiti trasformazionali. Collaborerai a stretto contatto con le parti interessate attraverso Experience, Retail, Marketing, Newbuild e Strategy, assicurando che i concetti siano analiticamente sani, orientati agli insight e allineati alle aspettative dell'azienda. Potrai ottenere l'esposizione a discussioni strategiche, influenzare il processo decisionale senior, e guidare la chiarezza attraverso i flussi di lavoro di innovazione. Se sei un pensatore acuto, un sfidante naturale, e un partner affidabile in grado di elevare il lavoro degli altri, questo è il ruolo per voi Il tuo impatto Supporto strategico e partenariato di pensiero - Agire come partner strategico diretto al Senior Manager, aiutando il pensiero della struttura, i problemi della struttura e affinare le narrazioni dei concetti. - Partecipare o condurre riunioni selezionate per conto dell'Innovazione dell'esperienza ospite - Preparare brevi strategici, quadri decisionali e documenti di sintesi per conversazioni a livello SVP. Narrative Building & Executive-Ready Comunicazione - Materiali di storytelling chiari, concisi e strategicamente sani per forum di leadership - Trasformare informazioni complesse in narrazioni ad alto impatto. - Sostenere la leadership nella preparazione delle discussioni del Comitato SVP/EVP/Executive. Collaborazione trasversale - Coinvolgere con i team Experience, Entertainment, Retail, Marketing, Newbuild, Strategy e Operations per raccogliere idee e concetti di forma. - Condurre lo sviluppo e la consegna di nuovi concetti di intrattenimento, esperienze e spazi attraverso la nostra flotta. - Agire come il collegamento chiave tra partner creativi, operazioni e funzioni aziendali, garantendo allineamento e buy-in in ogni fase. Project & Stakeholder Management - Guidare la chiarezza nei flussi di lavoro strutturando le linee temporali, identificare i punti di decisione e anticipare i rischi. - Seguire con gli stakeholder per garantire il progresso e l'allineamento. - Elevare i problemi presto e proporre scenari di mitigazione. Il tuo viaggio finora - 5-8 anni di strategia, innovazione, business design, consulenza o gestione strategica del progetto. - L'esperienza in ospitalità, crociera, vendita al dettaglio, beni di consumo, o l'esperienza degli ospiti è un vantaggio forte. - Forte sfondo nella progettazione e nell'esecuzione di esperienze orientate agli ospiti, dal concetto alla consegna. - Un equilibrio di creatività e know-how operativo, in grado di sognare grande e consegnare praticamente. - Provato track record nella gestione di team complessi e interfunzionali (operazioni, creativo, marketing, vendite, ricavi, comunicazioni), con la capacità di unire prospettive diverse intorno a una singola visione. - Ottima conoscenza dei moderni strumenti di comunicazione visiva (Canva, Adobe Suite, piattaforme creative basate su AI) per produrre documenti visivi e attività di storytelling oltre i tradizionali ponti di scorrimento. - Eccellente capacità di costruzione di relazioni; in grado di ispirare, influenzare e connettersi tra diverse squadre. - Forte capacità di narrazione e presentazione, con fiducia a livello esecutivo. - Capacità di viaggiare 20-30% del tempo. - Inglese fluente; lingue aggiuntive a plus. I tuoi essenziali - Ottima conoscenza dei moderni strumenti di comunicazione visiva (Canva, Adobe Suite, piattaforme creative basate su AI) per produrre documenti visivi e attività di storytelling oltre i tradizionali ponti di scorrimento. - Eccellente capacità di costruzione di relazioni; in grado di ispirare, influenzare e connettersi tra diverse squadre. - Forte capacità di narrazione e presentazione, con fiducia a livello esecutivo. - Proficienza in Excel, PowerPoint e Outlook. - Capacità di viaggiare 20-30% del tempo. - Inglese fluente; lingue aggiuntive a plus - EU Passport o diritto di lavoro in Svizzera. Il nostro impegno Ci impegniamo a costruire un futuro che valorizza diverse prospettive, abbraccia il mondo oltre i confini, e promuove un ambiente inclusivo in cui ogni individuo si sente valorizzato, rispettato e potenziato per essere il proprio sé autentico. Il nostro impegno si estende a intraprendere azioni significative e misurabili che hanno un impatto positivo a lungo termine sui nostri ospiti, sui nostri dipendenti e sul nostro pianeta. Pronto a trasformare la tua passione in qualcosa di straordinario? Unisciti a noi a MSC Crociere, dove attendono nuove opportunità. Applicare oggi per essere parte di un team globale che sta spingendo i confini e raggiungere qualcosa di notevole. Il tuo viaggio inizia qui!

descriptionByLocale.de: Ihr Ziel Sie zeichnen sich dadurch aus, Komplexität in Klarheit zu verwandeln? Wir suchen einen New Builds Development & Delivery Manager, der als Erweiterung des Senior Managers of Concept Innovation fungiert, strategisches Denken verbessert, die Entscheidungsgeschwindigkeit verbessert und dazu beiträgt, robuste, qualitativ hochwertige Konzepte an Senior Leader zu bringen. Diese Rolle ist nicht funktionsfähig und nicht eine Präsentations-updating Position. Es ist eine Partnerschaftsrolle, die für jemanden entwickelt wird, der kritisch denken kann, mehrdeutige Probleme strukturieren, Erkenntnisse herausfordern und die Entwicklung von transformierenden Gasterlebnis-Konzepten unterstützen kann. Sie werden eng mit den Stakeholdern in den Bereichen Experience, Retail, Marketing, Newbuild und Strategie zusammenarbeiten, um zu gewährleisten, dass Konzepte analytisch fundiert, einsichtsorientiert und mit den Erwartungen des Unternehmens übereinstimmen. Sie werden sich mit strategischen Diskussionen auseinandersetzen, ältere Entscheidungsfindungen beeinflussen und Klarheit über Innovationsarbeitsbereiche schaffen. Narrative Gebäude & Executive-Ready Kommunikation - Handwerk klare, prägnant und strategisch fundierte Geschichten für Führungsforen - Transformieren Sie komplexe Informationen in hochwirksame Erzählungen. - Unterstützung bei der Vorbereitung auf SVP/EVP/Executive Committee Diskussionen. descriptionByLocale.fr: Votre but Vous excellez à transformer la complexité en clarté ? Êtes-vous énergisé en formant des idées, en contestant des hypothèses et en amplifiant l'impact d'un leader? Nous sommes à la recherche d'un nouveau gestionnaire du développement et de la prestation des nouvelles constructions qui agira à titre d'extension du gestionnaire principal de l'innovation conceptuelle, améliorera la pensée stratégique, améliorera la rapidité de prise de décisions et aidera à apporter des concepts robustes et de haute qualité aux cadres supérieurs. Ce rôle n'est pas opérationnel ni un poste de mise à jour de présentation. Il s'agit d'un rôle de partenariat, conçu pour quelqu'un qui peut penser critiquement, structurer des problèmes ambigus, remettre en question les idées, et soutenir le développement de concepts d'expérience d'invité transformationnelle. Vous collaborerez étroitement avec les intervenants de Experience, Retail, Marketing, Newbuild et Strategy, en veillant à ce que les concepts soient solides sur le plan analytique, axés sur les idées et conformes aux attentes de l'entreprise. Vous serez exposé à des discussions stratégiques, influencerez la prise de décisions et favoriserez la clarté dans tous les secteurs de l'innovation. Si vous êtes un bon penseur, un challenger naturel, et un partenaire de confiance capable d'élever le travail des autres, c'est le rôle pour vous Votre impact Partenariat stratégique de soutien et de réflexion - Agir en tant que partenaire stratégique direct du gestionnaire principal, aider à structurer la réflexion, à encadrer les problèmes et à affiner les narrations conceptuelles. - Participer ou diriger des réunions sélectionnées au nom de Guest Experience Innovation - Préparer des mémoires stratégiques, des cadres de décision et des documents de synthèse pour les conversations au niveau du SVP. Narrative Building & Executive-Ready Communication - Craft des matériaux de narration clairs, concis et stratégiques pour les forums de leadership - Transformer l'information complexe en récits à fort impact. - Appuyer le leadership dans la préparation des discussions du SVP/EVP/Comité exécutif. Collaboration interfonctionnelle - S'engager avec des équipes d'expérience, de divertissement, de vente au détail, de marketing, de Newbuild, de stratégie et d'opérations pour recueillir des idées et façonner des concepts. - Diriger le développement et la diffusion de nouveaux concepts, expériences et espaces de divertissement dans notre flotte. - Être le lien clé entre les partenaires créatifs, les opérations et les fonctions de l'entreprise, en assurant l'alignement et l'adhésion à chaque étape. Gestion des projets et des intervenants - Conduire la clarté dans les secteurs de travail en structurant les délais, en identifiant les points de décision et en anticipant les risques. - Assurer le suivi avec les parties prenantes pour assurer les progrès et l'alignement. - Élever rapidement les problèmes et proposer des scénarios d ' atténuation. Votre voyage jusqu'à présent - 5-8 ans en stratégie, innovation, conception d'entreprise, consultation ou gestion de projet stratégique. - L'expérience de l'hospitalité, croisière, de la vente au détail, des biens de consommation ou de l'expérience des clients est un plus fort. - Forte expérience dans la conception et l'exécution d'expériences axées sur les clients, du concept à la livraison. - Un équilibre entre créativité et savoir-faire opérationnel, capable de rêver grand et de livrer pratiquement. - Expérience éprouvée dans la gestion d'équipes complexes et interfonctionnelles (opérations, création, marketing, ventes, revenus, communications), avec la capacité d'unir diverses perspectives autour d'une vision unique. - Excellente connaissance des outils de communication visuelle modernes (Canva, Adobe Suite, plates-formes créatives pilotées par l'IA) pour produire des documents visuels convaincants et des narrations au-delà des plates-formes traditionnelles. - Excellentes compétences en matière d'établissement de relations; capables d'inspirer, d'influencer et de relier diverses équipes. - Fortes compétences en narration et en présentation, avec confiance au niveau des cadres. - Capacité de voyager 20-30% du temps. - Anglais courant; langues supplémentaires a plus.
